name: Lite Article Exporter
description: Extract clean article content and export to Markdown, Word, PDF, or TXT while preserving image links.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: script-src 'self'; object-src 'self'; connect-src https://* http://* data: blob:; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://* http://*; style-src 'self'
